# KC's Sports Bar

> Wadsworth's neighborhood sports bar on Main Street. Cold drinks, scratch-kitchen bar food, breakfast all day, pool, darts and karaoke, open every day from 10am until 2:30am.

## Business facts
- Business: KC's Sports Bar
- Location: Wadsworth, OH
- Phone: (330) 336-5100
- Rating: 4.2 stars (213 reviews)

## Key pages
- https://kcswadsworth.com/
- https://kcswadsworth.com/menu/
- https://kcswadsworth.com/events/
- https://kcswadsworth.com/contact/
- https://kcswadsworth.com/privacy/
- https://kcswadsworth.com/terms/
- https://kcswadsworth.com/accessibility/

## Common questions
- What are KC's Sports Bar's hours? We are open every single day from 10:00 am until 2:30 am, including weekends and most holidays.
- Where is KC's Sports Bar located? Right on Main Street in Wadsworth at 346 Main St, Wadsworth, OH 44281, on the city's south end.
- Does KC's serve food late? Yes. The kitchen serves scratch-made bar food and breakfast all day, every day. Call (330) 336-5100 for today’s specials.
- What weekly events does KC’s run? Tuesday is $1.50 beer night, Wednesday is the 8pm pool tournament, and Thursday brings ladies night from 5 to 9 followed by karaoke at 9.
- Does KC’s have pool tables and darts? Yes, pool tables, dart boards, and TVs around the whole bar for every game.

## Website
https://kcswadsworth.com/
